programs.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programs.desc: Charlie and Frida host a fort cafe with pasta, puppets, and a visit from Unicorse.

programs.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programs.desc: Rangers Miah and Alex explore the layers of the rainforest, from the forest floor to the emergent layer. They play a guessing game using items from each layer, and Alex hangs around like a flying fox.

programs.title: Fireman Sam
programs.desc: When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.

programs.title: Knee High Spies
programs.desc: Jeremy and Deena need to sneak into the playroom and shut down Glitch's Noise Maker machine before it wakes cousin Milo from his afternoon nap.

programs.title: Stan Can
programs.desc: Stan is called to fix Myrtle's sofa while she watches her favourite dance show with Hettie and Hattie.

programs.title: Nikhil & Jay
programs.sub_title: Nikhil and Jay and the Monsooooooon!
programs.desc: After their grandparents in India have a monsoon, Nikhil and Jay want one at home.
